name: Dr. Aarav Mehta
about: Passionate mathematics professor with over 12 years of teaching experience. I specialize in making complex mathematical concepts simple and intuitive. My teaching methodology focuses on conceptual clarity, problem-solving techniques, and competitive exam preparation (IIT-JEE, Olympiads). I believe that math is not about memorizing formulas, but about understanding patterns and logic.

reviews.comment: Dr. Aarav has been teaching my son for JEE prep. The improvement in his scores and confidence is remarkable. Highly recommended!
Calculus used to be my nightmare, but Aarav sir made it so easy. The assignments are very helpful.

name: Ananya Sen
about: Physics is the study of how the universe works, and that's how I teach it! With an M.Sc. from IIT Delhi, I bring strong academic foundations and interactive teaching tools. I use 3D animations and real-world simulations to explain mechanics, electromagnetism, and optics. My sessions are highly interactive, encouraging students to ask 'why' at every step.

reviews.comment: Ananya is an excellent physics teacher. Her visual demonstrations help my daughter understand concepts quickly.

name: Rajesh Kumar
about: I make chemistry fun and approachable. Over 8 years, I have helped hundreds of students ace Board exams and competitive entrance tests. My lessons break down complex reaction mechanisms, chemical bonding, and stoichiometry into structured, easy-to-follow steps. I provide hand-written notes, practice worksheets, and weekly test series.

reviews.comment: Organic chemistry became my favorite subject after studying with Rajesh sir. His mechanism charts are life savers.

name: Dr. Priya Deshmukh
qualification: M.B.B.S, M.D. in Physiology (KEM Hospital Mumbai)
about: As a medical professional, I bring a unique clinical perspective to tutoring Biology. I specialize in training NEET aspirants, focusing on detailed NCERT explanations, diagrams, and previous years' question patterns. My goal is to make biology fascinating while teaching memorization tricks for complex terminologies, systems, and classifications.

reviews.comment: Under Dr. Priya's guidance, my daughter scored 345/360 in NEET Biology. Her coaching style is structured and result-oriented.

name: Vikram Malhotra
about: Hi! I'm a software engineer turned educator. I teach computer science, coding, and programming fundamentals. My classes are completely hands-on. We write code, debug together, and build projects. I teach Python, Java, C++, SQL, and full-stack web development. I focus on developing algorithmic thinking and logical reasoning, which are essential for any future tech career.

reviews.comment: Awesome coding classes! Vikram sir helped me build a full weather app. Learning Python was super fun.

name: Sarah D'Souza
about: English is more than a language; it's a medium of expression. With 10 years of experience in leading CBSE schools, I tutor students in grammar, creative writing, comprehension, and literature analysis. I customize my lessons to build communication confidence, vocabulary, and exam writing skills. I believe in active conversations and constructive feedback.

reviews.comment: Sarah has worked wonders on my son's reading and writing skills. He now reads novels on his own!

name: Siddharth Rao
about: Teaching Economics through current global events! I hold an M.Sc. in Economics from the London School of Economics and have 7 years of teaching experience. I cover Microeconomics, Macroeconomics, and Business Studies. I focus on understanding market mechanisms, graphical models, and policy analysis. Ideal for CBSE/ISC boards as well as university students.

reviews.comment: Siddharth sir explains economics concepts using real examples like inflation or stock markets. It is super interesting.

name: Nisha Verma
about: Specialist in middle and high school general sciences (Physics, Chemistry, Biology). I focus on building foundation blocks for kids transitioning to higher classes. I use hands-on simple home experiments, interactive quizzes, and visual slides to spark curiosity. I believe a strong foundation in science in classes 8-10 is key to future academic choices.

reviews.comment: Nisha teaches science in a way that my eighth grader looks forward to every single session. Very friendly and professional.
